ground_truth.description: create_solution_map() is a verbatim copy of build_solved_values() (defined at line 55) with only variable names renamed (params→specifications, x→solution_values, param→spec, val→computed_val). The function body, return type, assert, iterator chain, and Value construction are identical. This is pure code duplication that will cause maintenance divergence.

create_solution_map() is defined but never called in this diff. If it's meant to replace build_solved_values(), the old function should be removed. If both are needed, they should be consolidated into one.
